items.title: Coming soon: Alex Batty vanished at 11 - now he tells his story
items.summary: At 11 years old, Alex thought he was going on holiday. Instead, he vanished for six years.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: March Madness expands to 76 teams as committees lock in long-term men's, women's NCAA Tournament change
items.summary: A Thursday vote that was long awaited will now trigger the polarizing expansion of college basketball's most cherished event
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: IPL 2026 points table and top run-scorers & wicket-takers
items.summary: The IPL 2026 is in full swing, but who is leading the race for the orange and purple cap? BBC Sport looks at the top run-scorers and wicket-takers in the 19th edition.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
